sprint.name: My Tennis — Profile Revamp & Player Self-Expression
sprint.goal: Revamp /my-profile into a playful 'My Tennis' experience that helps the club get the most out of everyone's tennis, while hardening privacy on the open-internet shareable token URL via initials-only rendering and a write-only submission flow
focus_areas: Privacy hardening on token-accessed URLs (initials-only, write-only)
Rich, playful tennis self-expression captured as structured data
Groundwork for captain-facing planning (Sprint 017) without leaking anything back to players
